questions: Which company had the highest average quarterly growth rate across all four quarters?
Which private company has the largest headcount?
Which publicly traded company IPO'd most recently?
Looking at the full-year sum of quarterly revenue, which firm comes out on top?
Which company had the largest revenue increase from Q1 to Q4 (Q4 revenue minus Q1 revenue)?
Which company with over 9,886 employees produced the least total revenue across all four quarters?
Which company earning more than $1B total across all quarters has the worst satisfaction rating?
Which company had the highest revenue volatility (largest difference between its highest and lowest quarterly revenue)?
In the Sonic sector, which company was founded earliest?
Which company has the highest ratio of employees to total annual revenue (employees divided by full-year revenue)?
constraints: Write EXACTLY 20 words. Single line.
Must include the headquarters city of the company that answers Question 2.
Must include the CEO's last name of the company that answers Question 7.
Must include the headquarters country of the company that answers Question 9.
Must include a prime number equal to nextPrime((employees of the answer to Question 2 mod 100) + 11), as digits.
Must include the equation "A+B=C" (digits, no spaces) where A=((Q1 revenue of the answer to Question 2 mod 90)+10) and B=((Q4 revenue of the answer to Question 9 mod 90)+10) and C=A+B.
Acrostic: the first letters of the first 8 words must spell the first 8 letters of (initials(Q2)+initials(Q7)+initials(Q9)+initials(Q4)), uppercased.
Must NOT contain the letter "z" (case-insensitive).
Tip: avoid extra punctuation-only "words"; words are split on spaces.
